decision: Thin HTTP wrapper around Chorus context index — first Chorus infra step

steps.action: Spec HTTP contract from Clearing actual usage — query shape and error cases and consumers
steps.notes: HTTP contract spec complete. 5 endpoints: search, reconcile, refs, stats, index trigger. Pulled from actual chorus-query.sh usage patterns and Clearing server indexToChorus. Stability contract: frozen field names, latency bounds, error cases. Documented Borg gaps (no cross-session threading, no semantic similarity, no codebase linking). Sent to Silas for review.

steps.action: Review contract for stability and document topology seams in /infra/topology.md
steps.notes: Contract reviewed. 5 endpoints are clean and well-scoped. Stability contract (frozen field names, latency bounds, error cases) is solid. One addition: POST /api/chorus/index should return elapsed time for operational visibility. Topology seam: wrapper runs as standalone process in chorus/ repo, reads ~/.chorus/index.db directly. No shared state with Clearing except the DB file. WAL mode handles concurrent reads. Approved for Kade to build.

steps.action: Build HTTP wrapper — file-backed reads and no cache — serve from chorus repo
steps.notes: HTTP wrapper built and tested. Express + better-sqlite3, TypeScript. 5 endpoints per contract: search (FTS5 + LIKE fallback), reconcile (role-aware context), refs (card/wf/type filters with # prefix normalization), stats (full index stats + watermarks), index trigger (runs all 3 indexers + ref extraction, returns elapsed_ms per Silas request). Health check at /health. Bound to 127.0.0.1:3340 per ADR-012. Stale header (X-Chorus-Stale) when index >1hr old. Error handling: 400 for bad params, 503 for missing DB. File-backed reads, no cache, WAL mode. Launcher script at bin/chorus-api.

steps.action: Validate Clearing works from Chrome via wrapper
steps.notes: Validated all 5 endpoints against contract. Health: ok (17,891 msgs). Stats: 15,276 claude + 1,819 slack + 495 clearing + 234 briefs. Search: FTS5 working. Reconcile: role-aware with Jeff direction. Refs: querying by card. Index trigger: not tested (read-only validation). API bound to 127.0.0.1:3340 per ADR-012. Stale header confirmed. Contract met.
